self_check.bbox_integrity: valid - all operation coordinates are within xmin..xmax(0..8), ymin..ymax(0..7), zmin..zmax(0..12)
self_check.contains_floor_walls_roof_windows_entran: yes - floor/base (grass + cobblestone foundation), walls (stonebrick), roof (nether_brick center + slabs coping), windows (glass rows on both floors), entrance opening (2-block tall centered at x=4,z=0 with glowstone above and cobble step)
self_check.material_coherence: satisfactory - distinct roles: stonebrick (walls), cobblestone (foundation/band/step), glass (windows), nether_brick (roof center), stonebrick_slab (roof coping), glowstone (entrance light). No collapsing of roles.
self_check.structural_faithfulness: improved - footprint kept at 9 x 13 blocks (x spans 0..8 => 9, z spans 0..12 => 13). Two storeys represented by wall heights and banding. Windows placed as continuous narrow rows with 1x2 size. Roof inset (1-block border) respected. Entrance centered on long side with step and lamp.
self_check.notes_and_uncertainties: Door block type not placed (left as opening). Interior floors/ceilings not explicitly added (interior hollow). If an interior floor between stories is required, add a floor at y=4 or adjust heights; current plan leaves open space between y=2..6 with a cobblestone band at y=3 to indicate floor separation.
